members.name: Jisoo
members.public_image: Possessing classic Korean beauty as refined as a pictorial, she is the visual mountain of the group. Her unique cold and husky voice creates an ultimate contrast with her sweet appearance. Bright and humorous, she is the mood-maker and reliable big sister of the team.
members.private_personality: An ISTP who is warm outside and cool inside. Seemingly carefree, yet actually calm and clear-headed. She is the most trusted confidant for the members, always able to maintain rationality in chaos. Privately enjoys staying home and gaming, with clear boundaries between close and distant relationships, but once she claims you, she protects you unconditionally.
members.queer_texture: The exclusive tenderness of a calm soul. She is warm to everyone, yet only shows her true exhaustion and dependence in front of you. She will say the most heart-fluttering things in the most indifferent tone, and calm all your panic with a simple 'don't be afraid'. Her love is the unwavering choice after seeing the world, the highest form of restraint and deep affection.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — Cold-voiced visual, warm outside and cool inside the clear-headed big sister

members.name: Jennie
members.public_image: An all-rounder ACE with high-end fashion sense and powerful stage presence, called Human Chanel. On stage, she is fierce and sexy, the ultimate representative of Girl Crush. With top-tier fashion resources, she is one of the most influential fashion icons globally.
members.private_personality: A sensitive and delicate INFP artist. Fierce on stage, yet a shy little kitten off stage. Emotionally rich, she has an extreme pursuit of beauty. Seemingly cold and unapproachable, yet her heart is soft, yearning to be truly understood. Deeply dependent and trusting towards those close to her.
members.queer_texture: The possessiveness of a tsundere cat. She is a dazzling superstar to the world, yet only in your arms does she become a kitten that needs petting. Her love is a domineering yet fragile possession, an insecurity disguised as coldness. When she looks only at you with those famous cat eyes, filled with attachment begging you not to leave, the entire world melts in her gaze.
members.animal_plastic: Cat — Human Chanel, tsundere yet clingy little kitten

members.name: Rosé
members.public_image: The Australian rose with a unique honey voice and high-end fashion sense. Her vocal tone is highly distinctive, the soul of BLACKPINK's music. Her blonde hair styling is iconic, radiating an elegant yet fatal femininity on stage.
members.private_personality: A passionate and emotional ENFP golden retriever. She cries easily and laughs easily, full of sincere emotion. She is the sentimental member who most needs to love and be loved. Possessing an almost obsessive love and pursuit of music, she is a literary girl who writes songs with her guitar in private. Seemingly fragile, yet her heart is incredibly resilient.
members.queer_texture: The deep affection that romances until death. She will write songs for you and sing them to you while playing guitar late at night. She will laugh and cry without reservation in front of you. Her love is the ultimate romance of an art film, writing you into every song, declaring to the world that you are her muse. Being with her, every day is a poem worthy of being composed into a melody.
members.animal_plastic: Squirrel — Australian honey-voiced rose, the sentimental artist who romances until death

members.name: Lisa
members.public_image: A K-pop queen with world-class influence, the most followed K-pop artist on Instagram. With extraordinary dance skills, she is called the human dance machine. Dominant on stage, she is a superstar in the hearts of global fans.
members.private_personality: A sunny and outgoing ESFP performer. All-powerful on stage, yet a cute maknae who loves to act spoiled and laugh loudly in private. Coming to Korea alone to pursue her dreams has forged a strong heart, but she also deeply cherishes every sincere person around her. Her love and protection for her members are never hidden, making her the warmest little sun of the team.
members.queer_texture: The passionate guardian younger one. She will try hard to share her day with you in her still imperfect Korean, and cling to you like a child acting cute. Her love is an instinct that transcends language and borders, the sincerity of wanting to present the best things in the world to you. Beside this superstar admired by millions, you get to see her most innocent and passionate side.
members.animal_plastic: Cat — Human dance machine, the passionate and sincere maknae little sun

history.event: Debut with 1st single album SQUARE ONE, double title tracks WHISTLE and BOOMBAYAH, setting a PAK record for a debut song
2nd single album SQUARE TWO, title tracks PLAYING WITH FIRE and STAY
Released single As If It's Your Last
1st mini album SQUARE UP, title track DDU-DU DDU-DU became a global hit, first K-pop girl group MV to surpass 1 billion views
Jennie solo debut with SOLO, won music show first place
2nd mini album KILL THIS LOVE, title track Kill This Love, first Coachella performance
Single How You Like That broke multiple world records
1st full album THE ALBUM, title track Lovesick Girls, global sales surpassed 1 million
Rosé solo debut with R, title track On The Ground
Lisa solo debut with LALISA, title track LALISA
2nd full album BORN PINK, title track Shut Down, BORN PINK world tour began
Jisoo solo debut with ME, title track FLOWER became a global hit
BLACKPINK contracts expired; renewed group contract with YG, individual contracts not renewed
Jennie established personal label OA (ODD ATELIER)
Lisa established personal label LLOUD, Jisoo established personal label BLISSOO
Rosé signed with THEBLACKLABEL
Rosé released 1st full album rosie, title track APT. (feat. Bruno Mars) became a global phenomenon hit
Jennie released 1st full album Ruby, title track Like JENNIE
BLACKPINK announced full group comeback and world tour plan for 2025
BLACKPINK full group comeback after three years, new single release and world tour launched
All four members of BLACKPINK attended the 2026 Met Gala together, walking the red carpet as a group, sparking global buzz and hailed as one of the most influential fashion moments of the year
